slug.description: URL-safe identifier. Lowercase, hyphen-separated. Must match the filename (slug.json) and be unique.

term.description: The display name of the term, e.g. "vLLM".

acronym.description: Expansion or alternate name, or null if none. e.g. "Large Language Model".

category.description: Must be one of the categories listed in categories.json.

short.description: One-line plain-language summary shown on cards and lists.

definition.description: The full plain-language definition. Accurate, jargon-light, a short paragraph.

example.description: An optional code snippet or concrete example, or null.

related.description: Slugs of related terms. Each should point to another term file.
